## What does this PR do?

A clear and concise description of what this PR does. Reference any related issues.

Fixes #(issue)

## Type of change

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] ✨ New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] 💥 Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] 📚 Documentation update
- [ ] 🔧 Chore (tooling, CI, refactoring — no user-facing change)

## How has this been tested?

Please describe the tests you ran to verify your changes.

- [ ] Tested on Samsung Galaxy S26 Ultra (the primary supported device)
- [ ] Tested on another device (specify in description)
- [ ] Tested on macOS (the Mac controller script)
- [ ] Tested on Linux
- [ ] Tested on Windows

## Screenshots (if applicable)

Add screenshots of the changes if there's any visual change.

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the [contribution guidelines](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] I have read the [README](../README.md) and [TROUBLESHOOTING.md](../docs/TROUBLESHOOTING.md)
- [ ] My changes don't introduce any new warnings or errors
- [ ] I have updated the relevant documentation (if applicable)
- [ ] I have added or updated tests for the change (if applicable)
- [ ] All new and existing tests pass
- [ ] I have not committed any sensitive information (API keys, passwords, personal data, etc.)
